title: Important Notes
intro: Please review the following before your visit.

items.text: Our clinic operates by appointment only. Please book in advance.
Initial consultation is free of charge. You are welcome even if you are still considering.
This is a self-pay clinic (not covered by insurance). National health insurance and overseas travel insurance do not apply.
All fees are all-inclusive from consultation to treatment. There are no unexpected additional charges beyond the fees presented to you.
Same-day treatment may be available depending on the schedule. If you are considering same-day treatment, please allow extra time for your visit.
Treatment suitability varies depending on individual condition. Details will be discussed during your consultation.
Treatment is not available for those who are pregnant, may be pregnant, or are currently undergoing cancer treatment.
After receiving a stem cell supernatant IV drip, you will be unable to donate blood for a period of time.
A cancellation fee of 3,000 yen will be charged for no-show cancellations. Please contact us in advance if you need to cancel or reschedule.
If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to ask our staff.
